steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: Niger ratified the treaty (full official commitment), while Jordan only signed it and has yet to ratify it (lesser commitment). The blank needs a transition word that highlights this difference between the two nations' situations.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: “In contrast,” is the only choice that signals opposition between two different actions or states. The others suggest similarity, exemplification, or specification rather than opposition. That is the correct answer.
